study_title: Home Blood-Pressure Telemonitoring for Uncontrolled Hypertension (HBP-TM)
design_summary: 16-week, single-arm study of home blood-pressure telemonitoring with pharmacist follow-up. Participants measure their blood pressure twice daily with a provided cuff and upload readings weekly through the study app.

criteria.probe: To start, how old are you?
Have you been diagnosed with hypertension, that is, high blood pressure, by a doctor?

criteria.text: Most recent clinic systolic (top-number) blood pressure between 140 and 179 mmHg inclusive, measured within the past 3 months.
criteria.probe: What was your most recent clinic blood pressure reading, and roughly when was it taken?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot provide a systolic value OR cannot say roughly when it was measured, INC3 is unknown.

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone and is willing to measure blood pressure twice daily with the provided cuff and upload readings weekly.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and would you be willing to measure your blood pressure twice a day with a cuff we provide?

criteria.text: Able to read and understand English.
criteria.probe: Are you comfortable reading and understanding English?

criteria.text: Willing to participate for the full 16 weeks, including weekly uploads.
criteria.probe: The study runs a full 16 weeks with weekly uploads - is that a commitment you can make?

criteria.text: Currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning pregnancy within the next 6 months.
criteria.probe: Are you currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning a pregnancy in the next six months?

criteria.text: Diagnosed atrial fibrillation, atrial flutter, or another irregular heart rhythm (automated home cuffs can be unreliable in these conditions).
criteria.probe: Have you ever been diagnosed with atrial fibrillation or another irregular heart rhythm?

criteria.text: Stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA, 'mini-stroke') within the past 6 months.
criteria.probe: Have you had a stroke or a TIA, sometimes called a mini-stroke, in the past six months?

criteria.text: Currently taking 4 or more different blood-pressure medications (resistant hypertension requiring specialist care).
criteria.probe: How many different blood-pressure medications are you currently taking?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot say how many blood-pressure medications they take, EXC4 is unknown.

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial or structured blood-pressure program.
criteria.probe: Are you currently enrolled in another clinical trial or a structured blood-pressure program?
